top_signals.title: Peeling paint adds to woes of Trump’s pool project
top_signals.summary: The $14 million pool repainting project is already running into problems: the paint is peeling off and the pool is full of green algae.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
